summary: Phase 11 - Tested SSP Performance Analytics UI with Recharts visualizations. All core features working: overview stats, bar chart, pie chart, SSP rankings table, Top Performers tabs, SSP details panel with hourly activity area chart. Backend APIs returning correct data. Minor console warnings about chart dimensions during loading transitions (non-blocking).

issues: Pie chart labels overlap when SSP names are long or percentages are similar - acceptable for current 2 SSPs but may need legend for 5+ SSPs

missing_features.description: SSP Rankings table headers are not clickable for sorting. Requested feature 'sortable columns' not implemented - table just displays API order

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add sortable columns to SSP Rankings table (click header to sort by that column)
OPTIONAL: Fix Recharts console warnings by adding minWidth/minHeight to chart containers during loading transitions
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' appear during SSP details loading - caused by ResponsiveContainer rendering before parent has dimensions. Non-blocking but could be fixed by adding minWidth/minHeight props.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All visual features working, sorting not implemented)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing 'Test' and 'Test 2' SSPs
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSP Analytics page uses Recharts (BarChart, PieChart, AreaChart). Has 5 overview stat cards, performance comparison chart, request distribution pie, SSP rankings table, Top Performers tabs (Requests/Win Rate/Spend), and detailed SSP panel. APIs: /api/ssp-analytics/overview and /api/ssp-analytics/{id}/details

charts.request_distribution_pie: PASS - Shows Test (55%) and Test 2 (45%) with donut chart
charts.hourly_activity_area: PASS - Shows in SSP details panel with gradient area chart

ssp_rankings_table.headers: PASS - SSP, Requests, Bids, Bid Rate, Win Rate, Latency columns
ssp_rankings_table.data_display: PASS - Shows Test (60 requests, 3.3% bid rate) and Test 2 (50 requests, 6.0% bid rate)
ssp_rankings_table.row_click: PASS - Clicking row updates details panel
ssp_rankings_table.sorting: NOT IMPLEMENTED - Headers not clickable for sorting

top_performers_tabs.tab_switching: PASS - Tabs switch correctly with blue active state

ssp_details_panel.response_time: PASS - Shows min/avg/max with progress bar
ssp_details_panel.top_campaigns: PASS - Shows campaign distribution with bid counts
ssp_details_panel.regenerate_token_btn: PASS - Button visible and styled correctly

tested_features.page_loading_state: PASS - Shows spinner during initial load

details_endpoint.data_structure: Correct - ssp, metrics, hourly_distribution, campaign_distribution, response_time_stats, recent_activity
